system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight   28.96;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp          1004.5;
        Hf          0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu          0;
        Pr          1;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volVectorField;
    object      U;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (1.3 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (1.3 0 0);
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      T;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      p;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         4;

deltaT          0.002;

writeControl    adjustableRunTime;

writeInterval   0.1;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable yes;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       1;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
    reconstruct(p)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      blockMeshDict;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Left leg (x=0 to x=0.6)
    (0    0    -0.05)   // 0
    (0.6  0    -0.05)   // 1
    (0.6  0.2  -0.05)   // 2
    (0    0.2  -0.05)   // 3
    (0    0     0.05)   // 4
    (0.6  0     0.05)   // 5
    (0.6  0.2   0.05)   // 6
    (0    0.2   0.05)   // 7
);

blocks
(
    // Block 0: left leg (0 to 0.6, 0 to 0.2)
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (25 8 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 7 3)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (8 9 10 11)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 5 4)
        );
    }
    top
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (23 24 18 19)
        );
    }
    obstacle
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (2 3 7 6)
            (1 2 6 5)
        );
    }
    rightWall
    {
        type wall;
        faces
        (
            (11 10 9 8)
        );
    }
);

mergePatchPairs
(
);

// ************************************************************************* //')]</foamfiles>
<error_logs>[{'file': 'log.rhoCentralFoam', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Cannot find file "points" in directory "polyMesh" in times "0" down to constant

    From function virtual Foam::IOobject Foam::fileOperation::findInstance(const Foam::IOobject&, Foam::scalar, const Foam::word&) const
    in file global/fileOperations/fileOperation/fileOperation.C at line 869.

FOAM exiting'}, {'file': 'log.blockMesh', 'error_content': 'ERROR: 
Point label 8 out of range 0..7
    on patch outlet, face 0

file: outlet from line 47 to line 51.

    From function void Foam::blockMesh::checkPatchLabels(const Source&, const Foam::word&, const Foam::pointField&, Foam::faceList&) const [with Source = Foam::dictionary; Foam::pointField = Foam::Field<Foam::Vector<double> >; Foam::faceList = Foam::List<Foam::face>]
    in file blockMesh/blockMeshTopology.C at line 93.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

Looking at the current errors:

1. **`log.blockMesh`**: Point label 8 is out of range 0..7 on patch outlet. This means the mesh only has 8 vertices (indices 0-7), but the `blockMeshDict` references vertex 8+ in the outlet face definition. The current `blockMeshDict` has been simplified to only 8 vertices (the left leg only), but the outlet face still references vertices 8,9,10,11 which don't exist.

2. **`log.rhoCentralFoam`**: Cascading error — no mesh exists because blockMesh failed.

The simplification from Attempt 6 removed the right leg blocks but didn't fully update the boundary face definitions. The outlet face still contains `(8 9 10 11)` which are beyond the 0-7 vertex range.

## Resolution

**Update the `blockMeshDict` boundary face definitions to match the reduced 8-vertex mesh:**

1. **`outlet`** patch: The face `(8 9 10 11)` references non-existent vertices. Since the mesh now only has the left leg (8 vertices), the outlet should expose the far end of the step. The correct face for the outlet is the top surface of the step area: **(1 2 6 5)**. Change the outlet definition to:
   ```
   outlet
   {
       type patch;
       faces
       (
           (1 2 6 5)
       );
   }
   ```

2. **`obstacle`** patch: Remove any face entries that reference vertices outside 0-7. After removing the right leg blocks, only the step-side faces `(2 3 7 6)` and `(1 2 6 5)` remain. These should already be present.

3. **`bottom`** patch: Should contain only the front face of the left leg: **(0 4 7 3)**.

4. **`top`** patch: Should contain only the back face of the left leg: **(23 24 19 20)** — but since vertices 16-19 were removed, check the current file. If those vertices are gone, the back face may need to be redefined or the `top` patch may need to be removed entirely. Verify the current `blockMeshDict` — if no vertices remain for the back face, either remove the `top` patch or define it with remaining vertices.

5. **`defaultFaces`**: Ensure it references only existing faces. With only 8 vertices and 2 blocks, there should be no internal faces, so `defaultFaces` with `type empty;` should be fine.

**Key fix**: The `outlet` face must use only vertex indices 0-7. The face `(1 2 6 5)` (the top of the step/horizontal passage) is the correct outlet face for the simplified 2-block mesh. Remove the outdated `(8 9 10 11)` face entry entirely.

After this fix, the mesh should generate successfully (8 vertices, 2 blocks), and rhoCentralFoam should proceed with the simulation.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Change outlet face from (8 9 10 11) to (1 2 6 5); Remove the rightWall patch entry entirely since vertex 11 no longer exists; Update top patch face to use valid vertices from the reduced mesh - keep as (23 24 19 18) if those vertices exist, otherwise remove the top patch since the simplified mesh only has one block with no back face; Keep inlet as (0 4 7 3); Keep bottom as (0 1 5 4); Keep obstacle faces as (2 3 7 6) and (1 2 6 5)'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar, compressible flow over a forward-facing step using the rhoCentralFoam solver. Boundary conditions include a fixed velocity of 1.3m/s and temperature of 1 K at the inlet and slip conditions on the obstacle. Use timestep of 0.002 and output every 0.1. Finaltime is 4.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
